dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: System overview: Gateway status, channel connections, skill status

alerts.gatewayDisconnected: Gateway disconnected, data may not be up to date

connectionGuide.title: Cannot connect to Gateway
connectionGuide.subtitle: Please check the following
connectionGuide.step1: Make sure OpenClaw Gateway is running (default port 18789)
connectionGuide.step2: Verify the Gateway token is configured (use --token flag or install openclaw CLI for auto-detection)
connectionGuide.step3: If Gateway is on another host, use --gateway ws://host:port

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Manage messaging channels: Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, etc.

empty.title: No channels configured
empty.description: Select a channel type below to get started

qr.description: Scan the QR code with your WhatsApp mobile app to pair
qr.scanPrompt: Scan QR code with your phone

logout.title: Logout Channel
logout.description: Are you sure you want to logout "{{name}}"? You will need to re-pair.

gcpNotice.title: Looking for Telegram alerts and broadcast channels?
gcpNotice.body: Notification channels backed by GCP Secret Manager (admin Telegram bot, branch broadcast bots) are managed in Setup GCP, with Chat ID, secret rotation, and a built-in test button.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Manage skills and plugins: install, enable/disable, configure

marketplace.securityNote: Review the skill source, homepage, and dependency requirements before installing. This web marketplace view is built from the installable skills returned by the Gateway.
marketplace.emptyDescription: The current Gateway did not return any marketplace-ready skills
marketplace.noResults: No marketplace skills match your search
marketplace.author: Author {{author}}

empty.title: No skills found
empty.description: Try switching tabs or adjusting filters

clawhub.offlineNotice: Cannot connect to ClawHub, showing locally installed skills
clawhub.noSkillsDescription: ClawHub has no skills at the moment
clawhub.securityWarning: Please review the skill source code and permissions before installing. Third-party skills may access your system.
clawhub.installCommand: Run this command in your terminal:

configLifecycle.savedHotReload: Configuration saved. Gateway will apply its built-in reload handling automatically.
configLifecycle.savedRestartRequired: Configuration saved. Some changes require a Gateway restart to be fully applied.
configLifecycle.savedCliRestartRequired: Configuration saved. Run the command below to restart Gateway and apply the changes.
configLifecycle.applyRestarting: Configuration saved. Gateway will restart in {{seconds}}s.
configLifecycle.disconnected: Gateway disconnected while restart is in progress.
configLifecycle.complete: Gateway is back online and the latest configuration is active.
configLifecycle.runtimeAgentModel: Default model updated. New requests use the new model; current runs keep their existing model.
configLifecycle.runtimeAgentModelSessionsReset: Default model updated. Existing external channel sessions were cleared, so the next message on Feishu and similar channels will rebuild the session with the new model.
configLifecycle.runtimeSkill: Skill configuration updated and active immediately.
configLifecycle.runtimeCron: Scheduled task changes are active immediately.

cron.title: Cron Tasks
cron.description: Manage cron tasks: create, edit, enable/disable, run immediately

dialog.name: Task Name
dialog.cronHelp: Standard cron expression: min hour day month weekday
dialog.messagePlaceholder: Enter message to send to the agent

delete.title: Delete Cron Task
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this cron task? This cannot be undone.

run.title: Run Now
run.description: Are you sure you want to run this cron task immediately?

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: App settings: theme, provider, gateway, updates

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.emptyHint: Click the button above to add your first provider
providers.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{{name}}"? You will need to reconfigure it.

addDialog.title: Add Provider
addDialog.providerIdHint: Unique identifier in the config file

models.title: Models
models.empty: No models configured. Click above to add one.
models.name: Display Name
models.costHint: In USD per million tokens. 0 means free.

service.title: System Service
service.installHint: Install as system service so Gateway starts automatically on login
service.uninstallHint: Uninstall system service to stop auto-starting Gateway
service.confirmStop: Are you sure you want to stop the Gateway service? All connections will be dropped.
service.confirmRestart: Are you sure you want to restart the Gateway service? The connection will be briefly interrupted.
service.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall the system service?
service.platformUnavailableHint: Please start the Platform Service first (pnpm platform). Service management requires it to execute local commands.

logs.title: Log Viewer
logs.description: View Gateway runtime logs in real time
logs.noLogs: No logs yet. Click "Start Following" to view live logs.

gateway.title: Gateway
gateway.notConnectedHint: Make sure OpenClaw Gateway is running

update.title: Updates
update.confirmDescription: The Gateway will restart during the update and the connection will be briefly interrupted. Continue?
update.resultOk: Update successful, version upgraded from {{before}} to {{after}}, Gateway is restarting

developer.title: Developer Tools
developer.tokenHint: Use CLI `openclaw config get gateway.auth.token` to view the full token

settings.restartWarning: Gateway will automatically restart after saving configuration, connection will be briefly interrupted
settings.configConflict: Configuration was modified by another client, automatically reloaded

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.description: Manage agent configuration, core files, and model settings
agents.selectAgentDesc: Select an agent from the list to view details

overview.title: Basic Info
overview.name: Name
overview.runtimeHint: Only affects new requests; in-progress runs keep their current model.

files.title: Core Files
files.description: Bootstrap persona, identity, and tool guidance.
files.selectFile: Select a file to view its content

tools.title: Tool Policy
tools.noConfig: No tool policy configured for this agent
tools.saveConflict: Config changed, please reload and retry

skills.title: Skill Configuration
skills.modeAllDesc: No restriction, all available skills can be used

restart.required: Configuration saved. A Gateway restart is required for changes to take effect.
restart.done: Gateway restarted. Configuration is now active.

channels.title: Channel Status
channels.gatewayInfo: Showing Gateway-level channel status. Channel-agent bindings are managed in the config file.

cronJobs.title: Scheduled Tasks
cronJobs.noCronJobs: No scheduled tasks for this agent
cronJobs.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

setupGcp.title: Setup GCP
setupGcp.description: Approve new branch nodes joining the fleet and manage notification channels (Telegram, etc.) backed by GCP Secret Manager.

secretsNotice.title: Secrets stay in GCP Secret Manager
secretsNotice.body: Bot tokens and other credentials are stored in GCP Secret Manager via the fleet-registry-api. Plaintext values are never persisted in the browser or in the registry database.

notConfigured.title: Registry API not configured
notConfigured.body: Set VITE_REGISTRY_API_URL or inject window.__OPENCLAW_CONFIG__.registryApiUrl at runtime. The default targets the HQ sidecar over Tailscale (http://openclaw-hq:8781) and trusts the VPN as the perimeter — no bearer token is required.

pairing.title: Pending pairing requests
pairing.description: Branch nodes that have published themselves over Tailscale and are waiting for HQ to authorize delegation.
pairing.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Why is this request being rejected?

empty.title: No requests in this state
empty.description: Branches that contact the registry will appear here.

channels.title: Notification channels
channels.description: Channels used by HQ-Cloud and branches to send alerts. Telegram is the first supported transport.
channels.secretPlaceholder: Paste bot token or webhook secret
channels.secretHint: Stored as a new GCP Secret Manager version. Earlier versions are kept for rollback.
channels.testMessagePlaceholder: Optional — leave blank for default ping

empty.title: No channels configured
empty.description: Add a channel to start receiving fleet notifications.

deleteDialog.title: Delete channel
deleteDialog.description: Delete "{{name}}"? The associated GCP secret will also be removed.

openhands.title: OpenHands LLM profiles
openhands.description: Provider profiles consumed by Alekhine's OpenHands wrapper. The active profile drives every OpenHands run on this fleet.

banner.title: Active profile drives OpenHands
banner.body: The profile marked default is what Alekhine's OpenHands wrapper uses. API keys are persisted in GCP Secret Manager — never in the browser or registry DB.

empty.title: No profiles configured
empty.description: Create a profile to bind an LLM provider/model + API key to OpenHands.

deleteDialog.title: Delete profile
deleteDialog.description: Delete "{{label}}"? The associated GCP secret will also be removed.

fields.label: Label
fields.apiKeyOptional: API key (optional, can be set later)
fields.apiKeyHint: Stored as a new GCP Secret Manager version. Earlier versions are kept for rollback.
fields.testPromptPlaceholder: Optional — leave blank for default ping
